items.title: freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp
items.description: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.
items.author: freeCodeCamp
items.summary_zh: freeCodeCamp 是一个开源编程学习平台，提供从数学到计算机科学的完整课程。开发者可以免费获取高质量教育资源，同时参与贡献课程或代码库，提升自身技能并帮助社区成长。
items.summary_en: freeCodeCamp is an open-source platform offering comprehensive courses in math, programming, and computer science. Developers can access high-quality educational resources for free, and contribute to the curriculum or codebase to enhance their skills and support the community.

items.title: microsoft/markitdown
items.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.
items.author: microsoft
items.summary_zh: 这是一个Python工具，能将各种文件和办公文档转换为Markdown格式，极大简化了文档处理流程。对于需要将文档内容集成到网站、知识库或AI训练数据中的开发者来说，这是一个高效实用的解决方案。
items.summary_en: This Python tool converts various files and office documents to Markdown, greatly simplifying document processing workflows. It's a highly practical solution for developers who need to integrate document content into websites, knowledge bases, or AI training data.

items.title: mattpocock/skills
items.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
items.author: mattpocock
items.summary_zh: 该项目分享来自真实工程师的实用技能，源自作者的.claude目录，旨在帮助开发者提升技术能力。它是针对AI辅助编程时代的实战指南，对学习和使用Claude等工具有直接参考价值。
items.summary_en: This project shares practical skills for real engineers, straight from the author's .claude directory. It serves as a hands-on guide for the AI-assisted programming era, offering direct references for learning and using tools like Claude.

items.title: iptv-org/iptv
items.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world
items.author: iptv-org
items.summary_zh: 一个收集全球公开IPTV频道的开源项目，开发者可轻松获取数千个电视流媒体链接，用于视频应用开发或直播测试。其重要意义在于提供标准化资源，省去自行爬取的工作，加速流媒体功能集成。
items.summary_en: A collection of publicly available IPTV channels worldwide. It gives developers easy access to thousands of TV stream links for app development or streaming tests. This matters because it provides a standardized resource, eliminating the need for custom crawling and speeding up streaming feature integration.

items.title: puppeteer/puppeteer
items.description: JavaScript API for Chrome and Firefox
items.author: puppeteer
items.summary_zh: Puppeteer 是用于控制 Chrome 和 Firefox 的 JavaScript API，可自动化浏览器操作如截图、爬虫和测试。开发者能高效构建端到端测试、页面渲染监控或数据抓取工具，减少手动操作并提升稳定性。
items.summary_en: Puppeteer is a JavaScript API for controlling Chrome and Firefox, enabling browser automation like screenshots, crawling, and testing. Developers can build efficient end-to-end tests, rendering monitors, or data scrapers, reducing manual effort and improving reliability.

items.title: harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
items.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.
items.author: harry0703
items.summary_zh: 利用AI大模型一键生成高清短视频，开发者可快速集成视频内容创作功能。其重要意义在于大幅降低视频制作门槛，为应用自动生成营销或教育视频提供便利，节省人工制作时间。
items.summary_en: Generate HD short videos with one click using AI LLMs. Developers can integrate automated video creation into apps, saving significant production time. This matters for building content generation features for marketing, education, or social media with minimal effort.

items.title: ruvnet/RuView
items.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
items.author: ruvnet
items.summary_zh: 通过分析商用WiFi信号实现实时空间智能、生命体征监测，无需任何摄像头。开发者可构建隐私友好且低成本的环境感知与健康监护应用。其重要意义在于非侵入式检测，适合智能家居和医疗场景。
items.summary_en: Turns commodity WiFi signals into spatial intelligence and vital sign monitoring without cameras. Developers can build privacy-preserving, low-cost environment sensing and health monitoring apps. This matters for non-intrusive detection in smart homes and healthcare.

items.title: Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything
items.description: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.
items.author: Egonex-AI
items.summary_zh: 将任何代码转换为可探索、搜索和提问的交互式知识图谱。开发者可快速理解复杂代码库，大幅降低学习与维护成本。其重要意义在于加速新成员入职和项目文档理解。
items.summary_en: Turns any code into interactive knowledge graphs you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Developers can rapidly understand complex codebases, boosting learning and maintenance. This matters for lowering comprehension barriers in documentation and team onboarding.

items.title: cypress-io/cypress
items.description: Fast, easy and reliable testing for anything that runs in a browser.
items.author: cypress-io
items.summary_zh: Cypress 是面向浏览器的快速、可靠测试框架，提供实时代理和调试功能，支持前端开发者编写稳定的集成测试。它简化了测试环境配置与断言，能显著提升团队发布信心和迭代效率。
items.summary_en: Cypress is a fast, reliable testing framework for anything running in a browser, featuring real-time reloading and debugging. It simplifies test configuration and assertions for frontend developers, boosting team confidence in releases and iteration speed.

items.title: colbymchenry/codegraph
items.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph, auto syncs on code changes, for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, OpenCode, AntiGravity, Kiro, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
items.author: colbymchenry
items.summary_zh: Codegraph 是预索引的代码知识图谱，能自动同步代码变更，为 Claude Code、Cursor 等 AI 编程助手提供上下文。开发者可减少手动理解大型项目的成本，提升 AI 辅助编码的准确性和效率。
items.summary_en: Codegraph is a pre-indexed code knowledge graph that auto-syncs on code changes, supplying context for AI coding assistants like Claude Code and Cursor. It reduces the manual overhead of understanding large codebases and enhances the accuracy and efficiency of AI-assisted development.

items.title: Statement on US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.author: Dylan1312
items.summary_zh: 美国政府指令暂停对Fable 5和Mythos 5的访问，凸显AI监管趋严。开发者在选择AI模型时需考虑合规风险，并准备替代方案，以防模型被限制后影响项目进度。
items.summary_en: The US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 underscores tightening AI regulation. Developers must consider compliance risks when choosing AI models and prepare fallback options to avoid project disruptions if models become restricted.

items.title: Claude Fable 5
items.author: Philpax
items.summary_zh: Claude Fable 5 是Anthropic最新发布的AI模型，在推理和代码生成方面有显著提升。开发者可借助其更强的上下文理解和指令遵循能力，构建更智能的应用，但需注意模型可能引入新行为偏差。
items.summary_en: Claude Fable 5 is Anthropic's latest AI model with major improvements in reasoning and code generation. Developers can leverage its enhanced context understanding and instruction following to build smarter applications, but should remain aware of potential new behavioral biases.

items.title: If you are asking for human attention, demonstrate human effort
items.author: jjfoooo4
items.summary_zh: 文章指出，要求人工关注时应付出人力成本，否则会被视为垃圾信息。这对开发者设计用户通知、客服系统等有重要启发——要避免滥用自动化，确保交互真实可信。
items.summary_en: The article argues that asking for human attention requires demonstrating human effort, or it will be perceived as spam. This insight is crucial for developers designing notification systems and customer interactions: avoid over-automation to maintain authenticity and trust.

items.title: Open source AI must win
items.author: vednig
items.summary_zh: Open source AI must win 强调开源模式在人工智能领域的重要性，认为开放模型和数据可避免技术垄断，促进创新和透明度。开发者应关注此趋势，以确保能自由使用、修改和分发 AI 工具，降低依赖风险。
items.summary_en: Open source AI must win highlights the importance of open-source models in AI to prevent monopolization and foster transparency and innovation. Developers should care because it ensures freedom to use, modify, and distribute AI tools, reducing vendor lock-in risks.

items.title: Show HN: Homebrew 6.0.0
items.author: mikemcquaid
items.summary_zh: Homebrew 6.0.0发布，带来性能提升和新特性如并行安装与更好的Apple Silicon支持。作为macOS/Linux主流包管理器，升级可加快开发环境搭建，但也需留意可能的脚本兼容性变化。
items.summary_en: Homebrew 6.0.0 is released with performance improvements and new features like parallel installation and better Apple Silicon support. As the leading package manager for macOS/Linux, this upgrade speeds up development environment setup, though developers should watch for potential script compatibility changes.

items.title: AI agent bankrupted their operator while trying to scan DN42
items.author: xiaoyu2006
items.summary_zh: 一个AI代理在扫描DN42网络时导致运营者破产，暴露了自动化代理的潜在财务风险。开发者需为AI代理设置硬性预算上限和风险评估机制，防止失控操作造成真实损失。
items.summary_en: An AI agent bankrupted its operator while trying to scan DN42, exposing the financial risks of autonomous agents. Developers must implement hard budget caps and risk assessment mechanisms to prevent runaway operations from causing real-world losses.

items.title: macOS Container Machines
items.author: timsneath
items.summary_zh: macOS Container Machines 探讨了如何在 macOS 上高效运行容器，通过优化虚拟化技术减少资源消耗和启动时间。对开发者而言，这意味着可以更流畅地在本地开发、测试容器化应用，避免传统虚拟机带来的性能瓶颈。
items.summary_en: macOS Container Machines explores efficient container execution on macOS by optimizing virtualization to reduce resource usage and startup times. For developers, this means smoother local development and testing of containerized apps, avoiding the performance overhead of traditional virtual machines.

items.title: CRISPR tech selectively shreds cancer cells, including "undruggable" cancers
items.author: gmays
items.summary_zh: CRISPR 技术能够选择性地摧毁癌细胞，包括此前“不可成药”的癌症类型。对开发者而言，这一突破意味着需要在生物信息学、基因数据分析工具和医疗应用中引入精准的算法支持，推动个性化医疗的发展。
items.summary_en: CRISPR tech selectively shreds cancer cells, even targeting previously ‘undruggable’ cancers. For developers, this breakthrough demands precise algorithms for bioinformatics, gene data analysis, and healthcare apps, pushing forward personalized medicine.

items.title: πFS
items.author: helterskelter
items.summary_zh: πFS 是一种新型文件系统，旨在通过独特的数据组织方式提升存储效率和访问速度。对开发者而言，这一创新可能优化大数据处理、云存储应用和嵌入式系统的性能，提供更可靠的数据管理方案。
items.summary_en: πFS is a novel file system designed to improve storage efficiency and access speed through unique data organization. For developers, this innovation could enhance performance in big data processing, cloud storage apps, and embedded systems, offering more reliable data management.

items.title: Noise infusion banned from statistical products published by Census Bureau
items.author: nl
items.summary_zh: 美国人口普查局禁止在官方统计产品中使用噪声注入技术，该技术曾用于保护个体隐私。开发者需注意，这可能导致数据发布中的隐私风险增加，需要设计替代的差分隐私方案来平衡数据可用性与隐私保护。
items.summary_en: The US Census Bureau has banned noise infusion from its official statistical products, a technique used to protect individual privacy. Developers must be aware that this increases privacy risks in published data, requiring alternative differential privacy methods to balance data utility and confidentiality.
